files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+{
+  "compilerOptions": {
+    "strict": true,
+    "target": "ES2022",
+    "module": "ESNext",
+    "moduleResolution": "Bundler",
+    "allowJs": true,
+    "checkJs": false,
+    "noEmit": true,
+    "jsx": "preserve",
+    "isolatedModules": true,
+    "esModuleInterop": true,
+    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
+    "skipLibCheck": true,
+    "types": ["bun-types", "vitest"]
+  },
+  "include": ["scripts/**/*.ts", "tests/**/*.ts", "types/**/*.d.ts"],
+  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist", ".bun-check"]
+}
